targets.query:
from(bucket: "NUC_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cam_demo_handshake")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "NUC_metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "net" and r._field == "bytes_sent")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "NUC_metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cam_demo_handshake")
  |> group(columns: ["algorithm"])
  |> count()
  |> top(n: 1)

from(bucket: "NUC_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "powerstat" and r._field == "system_w")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "NUC_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "net" and r._field == "bytes_sent")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)

from(bucket: "NUC_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "powerstat" and (r._field == "system_w" or r._field == "cores_w" or r._field == "package_w"))

from(bucket: "NUC_metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cam_demo_handshake")
  |> group(columns: ["algorithm"])
  |> count()

from(bucket: "NUC_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cam_demo_handshake" and r._field == "appconnect_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
